Container.Name: Snacks
Container.Overview:
Automated video library encoder. Batch transcode your entire library with hardware acceleration (Intel QSV/VAAPI, NVIDIA NVENC, AMD VAAPI/AMF) to H.265, H.264, or AV1. Persistent SQLite database tracks file state across restarts. Smart filtering skips files that already meet quality targets. Optional cluster mode distributes encoding across multiple nodes on your LAN.
Network is set to host so the cluster's UDP broadcast discovery can reach the LAN — bridge mode would silently break it. Web UI listens on port 6767.
Hardware acceleration: pass /dev/dri (the default device template entry below) for Intel iGPU. For NVIDIA, install the Nvidia-Driver plugin and set Extra Parameters to "--runtime=nvidia" with NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=all.

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: Snacks web interface. Host networking is required for cluster discovery, so this is informational only — Unraid will not bind it.

Config.Name: Media Library
Config.Description: Path to your video library. Snacks reads originals here and (optionally) writes encoded files back in place.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persists settings.json and the SQLite database across container updates.

Config.Name: Intel/AMD GPU (/dev/dri)
Config.Description: Pass through Intel iGPU or AMD GPU for VAAPI/QSV hardware acceleration. Remove this entry if your server has no compatible GPU.

Config.Name: ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT
Config.Description: ASP.NET Core environment. Leave as Production.

Config.Name: SNACKS_WORK_DIR
Config.Description: Internal working directory inside the container. Do not change unless you know what you're doing.

Config.Name: FFMPEG_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the bundled jellyfin-ffmpeg binary. Do not change.

Config.Name: FFPROBE_PATH
Config.Description: Path to the bundled jellyfin-ffmpeg ffprobe binary. Do not change.

Config.Name: LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME
Config.Description: Optional VAAPI driver override. Leave blank for auto-detect (tries iHD then i965). Set to 'iHD' for modern Intel (Gen9+), 'i965' for older Intel.
